summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stripe payment integration for Hardware POS system. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for both 'Pay Now' and 'Charge to Account' flows. Stripe checkout session creation and redirect working correctly in test mode.
passed_tests: Withdrawal creation with 'Charge to Account' - logs as unpaid
Payment checkout requires valid withdrawal ID (404 for invalid)
Payment checkout creates Stripe session for valid withdrawal
Payment status endpoint returns session status
Cannot create payment for already paid withdrawal (400)
Admin can mark withdrawal as paid
POS page loads with cart and products panels
Checkout dialog opens with payment method toggle
Pay Now selection updates button to 'PROCEED TO PAYMENT'
Charge to Account selection updates button to 'CONFIRM WITHDRAWAL'
Summary text updates based on payment method
Charge to Account submission logs withdrawal as unpaid
Pay Now submission redirects to Stripe checkout (checkout.stripe.com)
seed_data_creation: Test withdrawals created during testing with job IDs prefixed with TEST-, UI-TEST-, PAY-NOW-TEST-
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe payment integration fully tested and working. Test credentials: contractor@test.com/password123 and admin@test.com/password123. The 'Pay Now' flow creates withdrawal first then redirects to Stripe. 'Charge to Account' just logs withdrawal as unpaid. Payment status endpoint polls Stripe for session status. Stripe is in test/sandbox mode (sk_test_emergent key configured).

charge_to_account.description: Creates withdrawal with payment_status='unpaid', logs for later invoicing

pay_now.description: Creates withdrawal, then creates Stripe checkout session, redirects to Stripe

payment_status.description: Returns status and payment_status from Stripe

payment_toggle_ui.description: Toggle updates button text and summary correctly
